home.hero_title: Formatting Your Thesis Has Never Been Easier
home.hero_copy: Don't spend hours on university templates with FormatEdit. Generate 100% compliant formatting in seconds with AI-integrated APA and IEEE automatic styling.
home.feature_1_desc: Margins, indents, indexes, and heading hierarchies are adapted to your template with a single click using AI.
home.feature_2_desc: See your edits instantly. Watch how your formatting dynamically reacts in real-time split-view mode.
home.feature_3_desc: Your references are instantly transformed into APA, Chicago, Vancouver, and integrated securely with in-text citations.
